entry.title: How to convert the csv file with multiple line headers and line items to xml in Sap Cpi ?
entry.content:
I am using the below csv data to convert it to xml and i am using the groovy script  i have attached the code i am using along with output i am receiving. 

input csv data : i just provided few records consider having bulk data 

RecordType,RecordID,InvoiceIssueDate,InvoiceID,AccountCategory,TermsOfPayment,HandlingCharge,AdditionalCharge,ShippingCost,TaxOnHeader,TotalAmountDue,TotalGross,CurrencySymbol,SupplierCode,SupplierFirm,SupplierReference,AddressCodeForPayment,TypeOfDocument,InitialInvoiceNumber,InitialInvoiceDate,DeliveryAddress,ModeOfPayment,PaymentTermsNotes

RecordType,InvoiceReferenceID,LineItemID,ItemNumber,ProductDescription,ProductCategory,PurchaseOrderID,OrderItemNumber,UnitPrice,ItemQuantity,UnitMeasurement,LineTotalAmount,ShippingAmountDistributed,MiscellaneousAmountDistributed,HandlingAmountDistributed,AccountingSegment1,AccountingSegment2,AccountingSegment3,AccountingSegment4,FinancialAccountName,FinancialAccountCode

RecordType,InvoiceReferenceID,LineItemReferenceID,SplitIdentifier,SequenceOfAllocation,PercentageAllocated,AllocatedAmount,DistributedShippingCharge,DistributedHandlingCharge,DistributedMiscCharge,FinancialSegment1,FinancialSegment2,FinancialSegment3,AccountCodeReference,FinancialSegment4,AccountHolderName

Header,202,2024-10-10T09:00:00Z,INVTEST1010-20,Premium Account,NET60,15,25,35,12,5000,5000,USD,40,GLOBAL ENTERPRISES,TEST0015,TEST0015,Remit Address
3,78901,2024-10-10,Delivery Address 3,credit_card,#<Updated Payment Terms>
Line,202,400,1,Updated Product A,New Category,PO-115,5,3000,,15000,,,,,,SegmentA,SegmentB,SegmentC,SegmentD,AccountNameA,AccountCodeA
Line Split,202,400,1,1,50,2500,,5000,,25000,25000,25000,25000-25000-25000-0005,10,AccountHolderA

Header,203,2024-11-05T11:00:00Z,INVTEST1105-25,Standard Account,NET90,20,30,40,15,5500,5500,GBP,41,TECHNOLOGY INNOVATIONS,TEST0016,TEST0016,Remit Address 4,89012,2024-11-05,Delivery Address 4,bank_transfer,#<Revised Payment Terms>
Line,203,401,2,Updated Product B,New Category,PO-116,6,3500,,21000,,,,,,SegmentX,SegmentY,SegmentZ,SegmentW,AccountNameB,AccountCodeB
Line Split,203,401,2,1,40,2800,,5600,,28000,28000,28000,28000-28000-28000-0006,10,AccountHolderB

 

Groovy code :

import com.sap.gateway.ip.core.customdev.util.Message
import groovy.xml.MarkupBuilder
import java.io.StringWriter

def Message processData(Message message) {
// Log the beginning of the script execution
println "Script execution started."

// Retrieve CSV data from message body
def csvData = message.getBody(String)

// Log the retrieved CSV data
println "Received CSV data: ${csvData}"

// Check if CSV data is null or empty
if (!csvData || csvData.trim().isEmpty()) {
throw new Exception("CSV data is empty or null.")
}

// Split CSV data into lines and filter out empty lines
def csvLines = csvData.split('\n').findAll { it.trim() }

// Initialize containers for data
def headers = [:]
def lines = []
def lineSplits = []

// Process each line
csvLines.each { csvLine ->
def values = csvLine.split(',').collect { it.trim() }

if (values.size() < 1) {
println "Skipping line with insufficient values: ${csvLine}"
return
}

def type = values[0]?.trim()

switch (type) {
case 'Header':
if (values.size() < 23) {
println "Skipping header with insufficient values: ${csvLine}"
return
}
def headerId = values[1]?.trim()
headers[headerId] = values
break
case 'Line':
if (values.size() < 21) {
println "Skipping line with insufficient values: ${csvLine}"
return
}
lines << values
break
case 'Line Split':
if (values.size() < 16) {
println "Skipping line split with insufficient values: ${csvLine}"
return
}
lineSplits << values
break
default:
println "Unknown type: ${type}"
}
}

// Prepare XML output
def xmlBuilder = new StringWriter()
def xml = new MarkupBuilder(xmlBuilder)

xml.root {
headers.each { headerId, header ->
Header {
recordType(header[0]?.trim())
recordID(header[1]?.trim())
invoiceIssueDate(header[2]?.trim())
invoiceID(header[3]?.trim())
accountCategory(header[4]?.trim())
termsOfPayment(header[5]?.trim())
handlingCharge(header[6]?.trim())
additionalCharge(header[7]?.trim())
shippingCost(header[8]?.trim())
taxOnHeader(header[9]?.trim())
totalAmountDue(header[10]?.trim())
totalGross(header[11]?.trim())
currencySymbol(header[12]?.trim())
supplierCode(header[13]?.trim())
supplierFirm(header[14]?.trim())
supplierReference(header[15]?.trim())
addressCodeForPayment(header[16]?.trim())
typeOfDocument(header[17]?.trim())
initialInvoiceNumber(header[18]?.trim())
initialInvoiceDate(header[19]?.trim())
deliveryAddress(header[20]?.trim())
modeOfPayment(header[21]?.trim())
paymentTermsNotes(header[22]?.trim())

// Append associated Lines
Lines {
lines.findAll { line ->
line[1]?.trim() == headerId // Match line invoice-id with header id
}.each { line ->
Line {
recordType(line[0]?.trim())
invoiceReferenceID(line[1]?.trim())
lineItemID(line[2]?.trim())
itemNumber(line[3]?.trim())
productDescription(line[4]?.trim())
productCategory(line[5]?.trim())
purchaseOrderID(line[6]?.trim())
orderItemNumber(line[7]?.trim())
unitPrice(line[8]?.trim())
itemQuantity(line[9]?.trim())
unitMeasurement(line[10]?.trim())
lineTotalAmount(line[11]?.trim())
shippingAmountDistributed(line[12]?.trim())
miscellaneousAmountDistributed(line[13]?.trim())
handlingAmountDistributed(line[14]?.trim())
accountingSegment1(line[15]?.trim())
accountingSegment2(line[16]?.trim())
accountingSegment3(line[17]?.trim())
accountingSegment4(line[18]?.trim())
financialAccountName(line[19]?.trim())
financialAccountCode(line[20]?.trim())
}
}
}

// Append associated LineSplits
LineSplits {
lineSplits.findAll { split ->
split[1]?.trim() == headerId // Match lineId with header id
}.each { split ->
LineSplit {
recordType(split[0]?.trim())
invoiceReferenceID(split[1]?.trim())
lineItemReferenceID(split[2]?.trim())
splitIdentifier(split[3]?.trim())
sequenceOfAllocation(split[4]?.trim())
percentageAllocated(split[5]?.trim())
allocatedAmount(split[6]?.trim())
distributedShippingCharge(split[7]?.trim())
distributedHandlingCharge(split[8]?.trim())
distributedMiscCharge(split[9]?.trim())
financialSegment1(split[10]?.trim())
financialSegment2(split[11]?.trim())
financialSegment3(split[12]?.trim())
accountCodeReference(split[13]?.trim())
financialSegment4(split[14]?.trim())
accountHolderName(split[15]?.trim())
}
}
}
}
}
}

// Convert XML to string and set as the message body
def xmlString = xmlBuilder.toString()
println "Generated XML:\n${xmlString}"
message.setBody(xmlString)

return message
}

output :

<root>

<Header>
<recordType>Header</recordType>
<recordID>202</recordID>
<invoiceIssueDate>2024-10-10T09:00:00Z</invoiceIssueDate>
<invoiceID>INVTEST1010-20</invoiceID>
<accountCategory>Premium Account</accountCategory>
<termsOfPayment>NET60</termsOfPayment>
<handlingCharge>15</handlingCharge>
<additionalCharge>25</additionalCharge>
<shippingCost>35</shippingCost>
<taxOnHeader>12</taxOnHeader>
<totalAmountDue>5000</totalAmountDue>
<totalGross>5000</totalGross>
<currencySymbol>USD</currencySymbol>
<supplierCode>40</supplierCode>
<supplierFirm>GLOBAL ENTERPRISES</supplierFirm>
<supplierReference>TEST0015</supplierReference>
<addressCodeForPayment>TEST0015</addressCodeForPayment>
<typeOfDocument>Remit Address 3</typeOfDocument>
<initialInvoiceNumber>78901</initialInvoiceNumber>
<initialInvoiceDate>2024-10-10</initialInvoiceDate>
<deliveryAddress>Delivery Address 3</deliveryAddress>
<modeOfPayment>credit_card</modeOfPayment>
<paymentTermsNotes>#<Updated Payment Terms></paymentTermsNotes>
<Lines>
<Line>
<recordType>Line</recordType>
<invoiceReferenceID>202</invoiceReferenceID>
<lineItemID>400</lineItemID>
<itemNumber>1</itemNumber>
<productDescription>UpdatedProductA</productDescription>
<productCategory>NewCategory</productCategory>
<purchaseOrderID>PO115</purchaseOrderID>
<orderItemNumber>5</orderItemNumber>
<unitPrice>3000</unitPrice>
<itemQuantity></itemQuantity>
<unitMeasurement>15000</unitMeasurement>
<lineTotalAmount></lineTotalAmount>
<shippingAmountDistributed></shippingAmountDistributed>
<miscellaneousAmountDistributed></miscellaneousAmountDistributed>
<handlingAmountDistributed></handlingAmountDistributed>
<accountingSegment1></accountingSegment1>
<accountingSegment2>SegmentA</accountingSegment2>
<accountingSegment3>SegmentB</accountingSegment3>
<accountingSegment4>SegmentC</accountingSegment4>
<financialAccountName>SegmentD</financialAccountName>
<financialAccountCode>AccountNameA</financialAccountCode>
</Line>
</Lines>
<LineSplits>
</LineSplits>
<Header>
<recordType>Header</recordType>
<recordID>203</recordID>
<invoiceIssueDate>2024-11-05T11:00:00Z</invoiceIssueDate>
<invoiceID>INVTEST1105-25</invoiceID>
<accountCategory>Standard Account</accountCategory>
<termsOfPayment>NET90</termsOfPayment>
<handlingCharge>20</handlingCharge>
<additionalCharge>30</additionalCharge>
<shippingCost>40</shippingCost>
<taxOnHeader>15</taxOnHeader>
<totalAmountDue>5500</totalAmountDue>
<totalGross>5500</totalGross>
<currencySymbol>GBP</currencySymbol>
<supplierCode>41</supplierCode>
<supplierFirm>TECHNOLOGY INNOVATIONS</supplierFirm>
<supplierReference>TEST0016</supplierReference>
<addressCodeForPayment>TEST0016</addressCodeForPayment>
<typeOfDocument>Remit Address 4</typeOfDocument>
<initialInvoiceNumber>89012</initialInvoiceNumber>
<initialInvoiceDate>2024-11-05</initialInvoiceDate>
<deliveryAddress>Delivery Address 4</deliveryAddress>
<modeOfPayment>bank_transfer</modeOfPayment>
<paymentTermsNotes>#<Revised Payment Terms></paymentTermsNotes>
<Lines>
</Lines>
<LineSplits>
<LineSplit>
<recordType>Line Split</recordType>
<invoiceReferenceID>203</invoiceReferenceID>
<lineItemReferenceID>401</lineItemReferenceID>
<splitIdentifier>2</splitIdentifier>
<sequenceOfAllocation>1</sequenceOfAllocation>
<percentageAllocated>40</percentageAllocated>
<allocatedAmount>2800</allocatedAmount>
<distributedShippingCharge></distributedShippingCharge>
<distributedHandlingCharge>5600</distributedHandlingCharge>
<distributedMiscCharge></distributedMiscCharge>
<financialSegment1>28000</financialSegment1>
<financialSegment2>28000</financialSegment2>
<financialSegment3>28000</financialSegment3>
<accountCodeReference>28000-28000-28000-0006</accountCodeReference>
<financialSegment4>10</financialSegment4>
<accountHolderName>AccountHolderB</accountHolderName>
</LineSplit>
<LineSplit>
<recordType>Line Split</recordType>
<invoiceReferenceID>203</invoiceReferenceID>
<lineItemReferenceID>400</lineItemReferenceID>
<splitIdentifier>1</splitIdentifier>
<sequenceOfAllocation>1</sequenceOfAllocation>
<percentageAllocated>50</percentageAllocated>
<allocatedAmount>2500</allocatedAmount>
<distributedShippingCharge></distributedShippingCharge>
<distributedHandlingCharge>5000</distributedHandlingCharge>
<distributedMiscCharge></distributedMiscCharge>
<financialSegment1>25000</financialSegment1>
<financialSegment2>25000</financialSegment2>
<financialSegment3>25000</financialSegment3>
<accountCodeReference>25000-25000-25000-0005</accountCodeReference>
<financialSegment4>10</financialSegment4>
<accountHolderName>AccountHolderA</accountHolderName>
</LineSplit>
</LineSplits>
</Header>
</root>

entry.title: Re: SAP Companion for SuccessFactors - Authoring Advice a...
entry.content: Thank you Shane, really appreciate your feedback on this. We ended up starting the Guided Tours at the Start Pages for our Managers and Employees. At the end of the Guided Tour we would often guided users back to the home page. The ability to jump into a Guided tour made things easier. For HR Admins we are still to do Guided Tours but these can start at other points within SuccessFactors and we will use a Business Role to restrict the visibility of these Tours. In terms of order we created ones call E01, E02 for Employee based GTs and M01, M02 etc for Manager based GTs.

entry.title: Re: SAP Companion for SuccessFactors - Authoring Advice a...
entry.content: Second set of comments: We did generate a GT and would duplicate and amend when the steps were similar but needed some amendments. This did save quite a bit of time.

entry.title: Calling Integration Suite ODATA APIs from ODATA Receiver
entry.content:
I need some help in setting up the ODATA receiver channel to call some of the Integration Suite APIs (Partner Directory / Message Stores / Message Logs).  So if I take the Message Stores ODATA API for example...I have been able to successfully call this from Postman using the following URL

https://<my_host>.hana.ondemand.com/api/v1/DataStores(DataStoreName='myDataStore',IntegrationFlow='',Type='')/Entries

passing the token and authenticating with OATH 2.  When I call this from Postman I get a successful response containing XML data listing all the entries in "myDataStore".

However, when I try to call the same from the ODATA receiver, I am getting this error...

"An exception of type 'WstxUnexpectedCharException' occurred." ...

when trying to configure the connection in the receiver channel.  Here's the screenshot of the error.

I am using these credentials of type Oath 2 Client Credentials ...

Here's the config for the receiver channel...

I have tried playing around with setting headers and metadata request headers with no success.  I am not sure if this is the issue or if it is because of the credentials type that I am using.  Has someone done this already and if so, wat do I need to change to get this working?

entry.title: Re: Katowice - SAP Stammtisch 10.09.2024
entry.content:
🥂

(jako że @ewelinas już użyła obrazku z kuflami piwa, to żebym się nie powtarzał)

entry.title: Re: Use of generic service payment provider in mobile order
entry.content: Hello, we are a SAP partner in Germany - we integrated a local payment provider via the generic approach successfully. The Integration from the provider was called "Payment Page", others call it "Pay By Link" - these should be the most promising approaches to do the integration. You would have to implement and run a service/server which sits in between cco-manager and the PSP.

entry.title: How to determine the corresponding Provider Contract or Provider Order of a cancelled PGI?
entry.content: Need to tie up or match Sales Order in S/4 with the Provider Contracts or Provider Orders in CRM? I got cancelled PGIs then I need to know what's the corresponding Provider Contracts or Provider Orders in CRM.

entry.title: Re: Custom CDS Views | Association not available
entry.content: HI Amith,

entry.title: Re: Mobile order notification to kitchen
entry.content:
This should be doable via the Print Jobs Fetching. You are able to intercept incoming orders with plugin logic and forward that to in your case to a display. 

See also: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_CUSTOMER_CHECKOUT/91f74f5d95324aec9bfa5e7c277f5cc2/06b3cfd7e44c4338aa949b1a53af49e7.html?locale=en-US&q=mobile%20order%20printing

entry.title: Failed to get OData service metadata document. Please enable Cross Context SSO setting under Securit
entry.content: Hi expert i m facing this problem, today when i try to update de metada document in my mdk app.

entry.title: Re: Custom CDS Views | Association not available
entry.content:
Hi Amith Nair / Vivek,
I am getting issue like below. What would be the root cause? Association of field STOTYPE ignored: Association for field PURCHASINGDOCUMENTCATEGORY is inconsistent [Analytics]
basic data type of STOType  is same as  PurchasingDocumentType
used cds as below in analytical view

association [0..1] to I_PurchasingDocumentType as _PODocType on $projection.PurchasingDocumentCategory = _PODocType.PurchasingDocumentCategory and

$projection.STOType = _PODocType.PurchasingDocumentType


{
...

PurchasingDocumentCategory,

@ObjectModel.foreignKey.association: '_PODocType'

STOType,

_PODocType,
...
}

entry.title: Re: IPU packspec file problem
entry.content: Bom dia, qual transação esta utilizando para o uploud dos dados?

entry.title: Re: Failed to get OData service metadata document. Please...
entry.content:
As indicated in the error message, please Enable Cross Context SSO and try again.

  1. Go into your app in Mobile Services and select the Security tab
  2. Click Edit for the Application Settings
  3. Check the Enable Cross Context SSO option
  4. Save
  5. Go back to the Editor and try again

entry.title: How to Retrieve Data from HANA DB Using CAP for OData Service in SAP Business Application Studio?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am working on a project where I need to retrieve data from an SAP HANA database using an OData service. I plan to use an OData adapter in SAP CPI (Cloud Platform Integration) for this purpose. From my understanding, I need to create a CAP (Cloud Application Programming) project in SAP Business Application Studio to expose the data via an OData service.

Could someone guide me through the steps to achieve this? Additionally, if there are any comprehensive documentation or tutorials available, please share them.

Thank you in advance for your assistance!

Best regards,

Anildeep

SAP HANA Cloud, SAP HANA database SAP HANA service for SAP BTP SAP Business Application Studio Cloud Integration SAP Integration Suite SAP Cloud Application Programming Model

entry.title: Re: Bulk upload of documents (pdf) - DMS ?
entry.content: Hi, I am currently working on exactly same scenario to upload multiple documents to many material documents. I have also created LSMW using the said message type and basic type. Eventhough theIDOC was generated successfully, I could not see the attached document in the material. Could you please help me how to achieve attaching the document in MM02.

entry.title: Re: Bulk upload of documents (pdf) - DMS ?
entry.content: Hi, I am currently working on exactly same scenario to upload multiple documents to many material documents. I have also created LSMW using the said message type and basic type. Eventhough theIDOC was generated successfully, I could not see the attached document in the material. Could you please help me how to achieve attaching the document in MM02. Thank you.

entry.title: DMS- Archive link configuration
entry.content: I am not able to access OAD5 T CODE FOR Dms Archive link configuration, it is not a roles or authorization issue. Please can some one help me how to resolve this issue.

entry.title: Re: Call web URL in ABAP class (eclipse ADT)
entry.content:
The S/4HANA Cloud ABAP Environment only allows you to create Service APIs that can be consumed using SAPUI5 applications or Console Applications that implement the Interface IF_OO_ADT_CLASSRUN. Both can't trigger your users browser directly to open a specific URL. 

Maybe you can not only describe what should be implemented but also why.

entry.title: Re: How to Retrieve Data from HANA DB Using CAP for OData...
entry.content: https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/

entry.title: Re: How to Retrieve Data from HANA DB Using CAP for OData Service in SAP Business Application Studio
entry.content: Can you provide more details on your usecase? Any reason why you would also add SAP Cloud Integration into the mix here?

entry.title: Re: Questions re: "ABAP Core Data Services" developer challenge
entry.content:
Hi @Shilpa.

I have submitted all solution during assignment week.

Could you please let me know when Community badge will be assign.

Thanks,

Nikhilesh

entry.title: Re: ABAP FTP_CONNECT with anonymous access
entry.content:
You have to use HTTP_SCRAMBLE for the password.

data: pwd(30) type c,
      key type i value 26101957, "<=== code for FTP
      slen type i,
      scrambled_pwd(60) type c. "<=== must be double length of PWD

slen = strlen( pwd ).
call function 'HTTP_SCRAMBLE'
  exporting
    source      = pwd
    sourcelen   = slen
    key         = key
  importing
    destination = scrambled_pwd.

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content: @joseph_anto great to meet you. I live in the US outside of Philadelphia. I'm a community advocate. May I ask your area of interests/expertise? Be sure to join the many interest groups too! Best of luck

entry.title: Re: API accounts search | Query with REgex
entry.content:
Hello @NAIM,

If I understand correctly, you want to either delete or restrict DISPOSABLE EMAILS in the CDC system, right?

  • Remember that profile.email is an encrypted field in CDC schema and hence you won't be able to use the contains filter in the query tool or via rest API.
  • We have implemented this by writing a dataflow to fetch the count of profiles containing such-domains and later add a regEx validation in your screensets to restrict registrations with disposable-emails.
  • Example REGEX: ^(?!.*@(tempmail\.com|mailinator\.com|yopmail\.com)).@.\..+$

Here's the latest github repository of a global List of disposable email domains.

I hope this answers your query and close the thread.

Thanks and Regards,
Kunal Bansal
SAP CX Solution Architect

entry.title: SAP MDG: Composite UIBB - List to List Possible ?
entry.content:

Suggu Sandeep.

Did above config. but not defualt tick on source determination.

entry.title: Apple In-App Purchase - How do I...
entry.content:
Hello all the experts out there...
Have you ever been able to add an Apple SDK into SAP Build. The real question is, how does one add In-App purchases as we have not found a solution yet. We really want to add In-App Purchases in our Mobile app.
Apple rejects our app with the following statement, "Apps that offer paid digital services and content across multiple platforms may allow customers to access the content they acquired outside the app as long as it is also available for purchase using in-app purchase. See Guideline 3.1.3(b) Multiplatform Services for more information."

I found this in researching Perplexity.AI
Explore Workarounds for SDK Integration Some developers have reported success in importing SDKs into SAP Build Apps projects by:
1. Packaging the SDK as a web component
2. Using a custom API to interact with the SDK
3. Leveraging the platform's ability to execute custom JavaScript code. But need some video or written support on either of these options.

However would really need advice from a SAP Build expert.
Thanking you in advance.

Best Regards,
Lorenzo

entry.title: Re: Export Simulation Video
entry.content: I don't know what's the problem, then. I'd open a ticket, because if the script is there, it should work...

entry.title: Re: How to Retrieve Data from HANA DB Using CAP for OData...
entry.content:
Hi @gregorw,

I am working on creating an application where data from SAP SuccessFactors is available in SAP Build Apps. The application will need to perform CRUD (Create, Read, Update, Delete) operations on this data. As an SAP Integration Suite consultant, I am looking to avoid performing CRUD operations directly within SAP Build Apps. Instead, I plan to handle these operations using SAP Cloud Integration, as there will be no of calls to Third Party Systems, The SAP Build Apps will primarily be used for showcasing the data.

I understand that SAP Cloud Integration can easily handle CRUD operations with SAP HANA Cloud using the JDBC Adapter. However, I am facing a challenge in showcasing the data in SAP Build Apps, as there is no JDBC adapter available there.

so could you please advise me on how can i create OData service out of HANA DB.

Thanks,

Anildeep

entry.title: RAP CDS annotation based custom action triggering automatic navigation to object page S/4HANA 2023
entry.content:
Hi Experts,
When I Click on CDS annotation based custom action  "clean" defined in table header triggering automatic navigation to object page. Action implemented using  bopf .

@ui.lineItem:[{ type: #FOR_ACTION, position: 1, dataAction: 'BOPF:CLEAN', label: 'Clean'}]

I have checked CDS annotation, there is no semanicaction and semanicobject annotation defined on this action  and checked bopf class and manifest as well did not find any root cause of this automatic navigation issue.
This is custom app
SAP S/4HANA 2023

entry.title: Re: backoffice UI broken
entry.content: Facing the same problem with CCV2 on dev backoffice :

entry.title: why dispatch done only to bottleneck resources in capacity scheduling board.
entry.content:
Why the CM25 functionality is not copied to capacity scheduling board app.

i.e. dispatching orders to all the work centers instead of dispatching the orders particularly for bottle neck work centers.

If I have more than one bottleneck work center for same order how this will be managed?

entry.title: Serial Numbers added in Production order are not reflecting in Outbound Delivery in 3DV Process
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

In SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud, when serial numbers added in a production order are not reflecting in the outbound delivery order during Warehouse Production Integration (Scope Item - 3DV), please suggest the approach to identify and resolve the problem.

Best Regards,

entry.title: Re: How to Upload a File in a RAP Freestyle V2 Application?
entry.content:
So you can't use the https://spreadsheet-importer.com/ ?

It is open source and has Apache 2.0 License. Enterprise support is also available

entry.title: Explore SAP Build Low-Code at TechEd 2024
entry.content:
SAP TechEd 2024 is right across the corner and the spotlight shines brighter than ever on SAP Build—a comprehensive suite of low-code and pro-code tools designed to accelerate application development and automation with the power of generative AI. Whether you're an experienced developer or just beginning your digital journey, SAP Build is here to provide business you with the tools needed to simplify app creation, automate processes, and design digital workspaces.

This blog will focus on SAP Build’s low-code offerings at TechEd 2024, highlighting key sessions that showcase how low-code can empower you to drive innovation and transformation within your organization.

SAP TechEd Experience 2024 

SAP TechEd 2024 kicks off with an exciting, free virtual event that’s open to everyone, offering a truly engaging experience no matter where you are. It is a great chance to connect with industry experts, developers, and IT leaders to discover innovative strategies that will elevate your career and drive your company’s success.

   📅 Save the date: October 8–9, 2024 

   🤝 Interactive, accessible, and virtual event

   🚀 Register now! 

Following this, SAP TechEd on Tour will bring deep dive, in-person learning experience to various locations worldwide. 

 

Highlight: SAP Build Low-Code at TechEd virtual 2024 

   🔷 AD100 | Unlock SAP Build and ABAP Cloud interoperability to elevate your extensions

Speakers: Thomas Volmering, Björn Schulz, Alexander Rother 

🗓 8th Oct 2024  ⏰ 6:00 PM - 6:45 PM CEST

Explore a fresh approach to building extensions while keeping your core clean. Learn how SAP Build solutions and the ABAP Cloud development model work together to foster fusion development. Whether you prefer pro-code or low-code tools, you can smoothly integrate them to build extensions tailored to your needs.

   🔷 AD102 | Unlock SAP S/4HANA Cloud extensibility with SAP Build

Speakers: Florian Buech, Karthik Thirunavukkarasan

🗓 9th Oct 2024  ⏰ 11:00 AM - 11:25 AM CEST

Explore the latest capabilities in SAP Build solutions to extend SAP S/4HANA Cloud while keeping your core clean. The extensibility wizard in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition provides direct access to various extension options both on stack and side by side on SAP Business Technology Platform. New remote function call connectivity in SAP Build enables clean core extension of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition using tier-two BAPIs.

   🔷 AD105 | Enhance your fusion team collaboration with ABAP Cloud and SAP Build

Speakers: Tim Back, Anne Keller

🗓 8th Oct 2024  ⏰ 7:00 PM - 7:25 PM CEST

Learn how to take advantage of interoperability between SAP’s low-code and pro-code solutions. Discover how you can use the graphical modeler in the development environment of SAP Build Code for the ABAP Cloud development model and how your ABAP Cloud projects can be integrated into the lobby of SAP Build solutions.

   🔷 AD108 | Enhance your business efficiency with SAP Build

Speakers: Yumnah Abbasi, Sruthi Chiramel

🗓 9th Oct 2024  ⏰ 8:30 PM - 8:55 PM CEST

Find out how customers extend their processes with SAP Build low-code solutions across HR, procurement, supply chain, finance, and sustainability applications. Learn how you can use prebuilt content in SAP Build to accelerate and benefit from the latest features, such as guided experiences.

   🔷 AD109 | Experience the next level of enterprise automation with SAP

Speakers: Seshadri Sreenivas Ramanarayanan, Palak Garg

🗓 9th Oct 2024  ⏰ 1:00 PM - 1:25 PM CEST

Explore the latest enhancements using SAP Build solutions, SAP Integration Suite, and SAP Signavio solutions together. Drive your AI-powered business transformation by combining process analysis, process automation, and integration capabilities. Extend your approval processes with API-based integrations, and find out how you can leverage event-driven architectures, turn process insights and modelling outcomes into actions, and orchestrate your processes at scale in heterogenous landscapes.

   🔷 AD110 | Accelerate development with the latest AI capabilities in SAP Build

Speakers: Rupam Bhattacharya, Marc Huber

🗓 9th Oct 2024  ⏰ 8:00 PM - 8:25 PM CEST

Discover the power of Joule in SAP Build solutions to accelerate your development process and AI features in SAP build that improve productivity of its users. Dive into the latest AI features designed for developers, enabling you to extend SAP S/4 HANA. Experience Gen AI powered fusion development firsthand in SAP Build. Learn how to automate processes and work flow productively with AI capabilities. Get a glimpse of what’s new and latest in AI features within SAP Build.

   🔷 AD181 | Develop applications and processes with SAP Build and Joule (Jump-Start session) 

Speakers: Eric Solberg, Patrick Schad

🗓 9th Oct 2024  ⏰ 9:00 PM - 9:25 PM CEST

Immerse yourself in creating comprehensive intelligent applications using SAP Build solutions in this hands-on session. Gain comprehensive knowledge of full-stack development, process automation, and business site creation with SAP Build. Learn how SAP Cloud Application Programming Model is leveraged in a highly productive development environment with Joule technology.

   🔷 AD200 | Extend Joule with SAP Build and develop custom enterprise skills

Speakers: Maria Kondratyeva, Miguel Angel Meza Martinez

🗓 8th Oct 2024  ⏰ 8:00 PM - 8:25 PM CEST

Discover the powerful synergy between Joule technology and SAP Build solutions that facilitates a smooth extension-building process. Learn how to enhance AI-powered capabilities in Joule with custom-developed enterprise skills tailored to your company's specific needs. By integrating with both SAP and third-party applications, Joule can instantly apply its newfound knowledge within SAP systems. 

----------------------------------------

In addition to SAP Build highlights, SAP TechEd virtual offers a wide range of sessions, organized into six content tracks. These tracks cover the latest SAP technologies, products, and solutions, ensuring that you can dive deep into the topics most relevant to your role and industry.

   🔍 Browse the full session catalog!

----------------------------------------

I hope this sneak peek has sparked your excitement to be part of SAP TechEd 2024 and explore all the latest updates around SAP Build and beyond. 

We can’t wait to see you there – Happy TechEd! 😊

entry.title: How to handle non-cumulative data in Datasphere ?
entry.content:
How do you handle non-cumulative data loading and passing to other cloud like GCP or Azure by using SAP Datasphere from S4 system?

In traditional BW, we typically had a separate process for initial setup and compression, such as with stock data. However, if this is currently outside the scope, feel free to disregard.

Any suggestions or artifacts or use case, please share.

entry.title: Re: Clean Core demystified: What does it mean and how to achieve it with SAP BTP?
entry.content:
I haven't seen anything worse in last 5 years than this.

Why is it part of SuccessFactors application consultant certification?

E.g. Succession planning when you discuss with the customer how to work with talent pools. Why you should know some marketing "clean core"? Why you aren't adding S/4 HANA knowledge to the certification as well? This is example of stupidity. Sorry SAP. Really bad decision.

entry.title: How to exclude PO from MRP calculation in S4 Hana Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,
I am currently working on manual recorder point planning for raw materials. I need to ensure that purchase orders are excluded from MRP calculations and that MRP only takes stock into consideration. Can you please provide guidance on the necessary steps and parameters that need to be set in the material master to achieve this? Additionally, I would appreciate a solution for On-premise also, as I can later relate it to the cloud.

entry.title: Re: How to Upload a File in a RAP Freestyle V2 Application?

entry.title: Re: Automatic Freight Unit Planning
entry.content:
Hello,

I use the same functionality for the Rail Process to create an Auto Rail Freight order from the Freight Unit.

With these above settings, it automatically creates the FU and Rail FO, but Rail FO is splitting into two Rail FO because of the 2 stages in Default Route.

We want to have a single FO. Anu suggestion?

entry.title: Re: SWPM Installer repeatedly asking for password even af...
entry.content:
To get around this problem I had to follow the following steps.

 

1) Create a local user on the server

2) Put this local user as a member of the Administrator group

3) Run sapinst with the following command:

<SAPINST.EXE PATH>sapinst.exe SAPINST_REMOTE_ACCESS_USER=<LOCAL_USER> SAPINST_REMOTE_ACCESS_USER_IS_TRUSTED=true

4) When opening the browser requesting login and password, use this newly created local username and password

 

Then it was just to follow the installation normally

entry.title: Re: S/4 HANA Finance: Foreign Currency Valuation - Transaction FAGL_FCV + Simulation Ledger
entry.content:
This is a good explanation.

I have seen the limitation of not assigning cost objects to the simulation postings. We do a lot of cost center and profit center reporting during month-end that would need these cost objects assigned in the actual closing postings. How do other companies close that gap if simulation postings do not include this?  Our actual month-end reports for cost centers or profit centers won't match the simulations.

We see an OSS Note that indicates this is just not possible, which makes the simulation posting process unworkable for us.

2891799 - FAGL_FCV - Simulation run does not post to cost object

entry.title: Re: Create an offline mobile app using successfactors oda...
entry.content:
Hello Jitendra, hope you are great!

I have good and bad news! The good one, I tried to use SAP CPI OData API as a middleware to reach SuccessFactors and it's working.

The bad, I'm still having problems to connect directly with SF.

I've done a documentation with all the steps to create the APP Connected with SF and other app connected to SF using CPI.

Here is the documentation, I'm sorry to ask this, but could you please take a look? This is a Notion website I've shared.

https://persistent-hovercraft-94e.notion.site/SAP-MDK-Offline-App-9c8c7d62cbb046cb816e5ae322229f44

Maybe I'm doing something wrong, I've been working in both apps to figure out why one is working and other one doesn't.

Any comments or suggestion will be helpful.

Thanks a lot!

entry.title: Re: What are SAP SF AI Features?. SAP Business AI
entry.content:
Hi @Deepak_Kotha,

Our AI capabilities are embedded across various products, so we do not have a single, dedicated learning path/course for AI. However, these AI features are covered in the relevant training material where applicable. I would recommend visiting the following page for more details:

Human Resources | SAP Business AI

I hope this helps!

Thanks,

Olivier

entry.title: 🔵 SAP HANA Cloud Multi-Model
entry.content:
In this session, we will focus on SAP HANA Cloud Multi-Model capabilities, especially the vector and graph engine.

Learn how a robust and scalable data management platform accelerates AI projects through fast data processing, real-time analytics, and advanced algorithms.

entry.title: Re: Missing the 'Develop' tab in SAP Cloud Integration on...

entry.title: Re: Content Repository Migration in mind ?
entry.content:
Hi SSB,

We have SAP ECC 607 and SAP Content Server 6.50 ( File System based repositories) running on Windows Server 2012. We have one reposiroty in ECC system connected to that Windows 2012 based SAP Content Server.  We planning to setup a totally new SAP Content Server 7.5 (File System based repositories) on Windows 2022 Server and wants to migrate the from old SAP CS 6.50 Repository content to the newly installed SAP CS 7.50 without changing the Repository name in OAC0.  Can you please help me procedure or direct me to a help to achieve this.  I keep seeing lot of SAP KBAs which does not talk about the straight forward procedure. 

Regards

Nara M

entry.title: Guidance Needed: Replicating Employee Data from Workday to SuccessFactors Employee Central Using SA
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am new to SuccessFactors integration and need some guidance on a project where we must integrate employee data into SuccessFactors Employee Central (EC). Specifically, we need to handle files (Terminations.csv, NewHires.csv, and Changes.csv) from the source system and upsert this data into SuccessFactors EC. The processing must occur in sequence to ensure data integrity, and we need to skip processing of files if the data already exists in SuccessFactors EC.

Given that Workday is not within our project scope, our focus is on using SAP Cloud Platform Integration (CPI) for file conversion and data handling.

If anyone has experience with replicating employee master data from Workday to SuccessFactors EC using SAP CPI, I would greatly appreciate your insights on the following:

  1. iFlow Implementation:

    • How to design and configure iFlows to process files (Terminations.csv, NewHires.csv, Changes.csv) in the correct sequence.
    • Best practices for setting up and configuring file adapters, content modifiers, and SuccessFactors EC adapters.

  2. Data Transformation and Upsertion:

    • Detailed steps for transforming and mapping data from the source files to the SuccessFactors EC format.
    • How to handle upserting new hires, applying changes, and processing terminations, including how to skip files if the data already exists.

  3. Error Handling and Monitoring:

    • Recommended strategies for managing errors and exceptions during file processing.
    • Tips for effective monitoring and ensuring successful execution of the integration flows.

Your detailed guidance and examples of handling similar scenarios with SuccessFactors EC inbound integrations would be extremely valuable.

entry.title: Re: Add object to a transport request by program

entry.title: Changed master data is not updated to existing sales documents
entry.content:
Hello,
Is there a way to update the Seller party and Invoicing Unit party address on already in process Sales Contract?
For other parties (For example Sales Unit) manual or dummy update is possible but not for these two.

Since Seller party and Invoicing Unit party addresses are still old/incorrect for older contracts and the new contracts have the new/correct address, acts this as a splitting reason for customer invoices, when several contracts are tried to invoiced with one invoice.

Please let us know if any further info is needed in order to solve this case.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How can SAP Odata Service receive payloads in JSON format?
entry.content: Where is the link?

entry.title: Re: Changed master data is not updated to existing sales...
entry.content:
Dear customer,

The changes of the master data such as addresses/name for Seller Party, Invoicing Unit etc. are not dynamically updated by the system because in some cases it is necessary to keep the old data for existing sales documents (in this case, sales contracts) or sales documents which are based on existing sales documents.

This is the standard system behavior.

To trigger the changes in the master data in sales documents you have to remove the master data e.g. the business partner and enter it again in your sales document.

For more information on this issue, please kindly check KBA 1508411 - Changed Master Data Are Not Taken Over Dynamically In Existing Sales Documents And New Documents Created As A Follow-Up.

Best Regards,

Marcelo
SAP Product Support

entry.title: The UploadSet control in SAPUI5 cannot upload files properly
entry.content: I'm using "sap.m.upload.UploadSet" and when click on upload button to upload files from local folder or laptop folder, the pop-up appears twice. On the second upload, the file appears as uploaded and showing the file name in the list. Please suggest to resolve this problem, Thanks.

It is taking the header date or current date. I believe we need to update the schedule lines after creating the sales order. As we need to do it in the same API call i believe $batch could be the solution.it will be nice if some one can help here to create and update(schedule line) sales order in same API call.

entry.title: 403 Forbidden Error when trying to access to the tile on my QA environment - SAP Cloud Public
entry.content:
Hi, basically I built an app using the ABAP2UI5 Repository, we are working on HANA Public Cloud environment and everything went OK in DEV tenant, we ran it and I created a custom tile to execute the HTTP Service. After some tests we moved everything to Test Tenant, transports and software collection import went OK, but when we tried to execute our custom tile in Test, it throws a 403 Forbidden error, also we tried with the Http handler URL and the DEV URL (changin tenant ID), but the same error shows up.

Had someone a similar problem when tried to move their APP to another tenant? We created an App sent by SAP, so it is supposed to run in PRD tenant. Have we forgot something in the process after transport? maybe somo authorizations.

Thanks & best regards,

Sreenu

entry.title: Re: Error series no definida entrada diario al cancelar un cheque
entry.content: have you already solved this "more than 2 checks" issue?

entry.title: Hello, Can someone please provide a configuration steps to implement T-Bill within treasury module.
PGI and PGR Automation for the completed Sales orders & Delivery orders
entry.content:
Hi Experts

I’m working on a business scenario and would appreciate any insights or experiences from the community. Here’s the process flow we are trying to achieve with complete automation. This scenario applies only to virtual orders; the same order types are used for virtual and nonvirtual processes.

  1. Return Sales Order Creation:

   - Create a return delivery order and assign the serial number (which is picked from a customized field in the sales order).

   - Post Goods Receipt (PGR) after assigning the serial number.

  1. Stock Allocation:

   - Upon PGR (From step 1), allocate the returned stock to the virtual sales order automatically.

  1. Order Completion and Delivery:

   - Virtual sales order is complete, and a delivery order will automatically be created.

   - Assign the serial number again and post goods issue (PGI) automatically.

Has anyone encountered a similar scenario? If so, how did you implement it? Looking forward to any suggestions or solutions.

entry.content:
Hi 

I think it can be controlled by status profile in sales order. Please try  It may help you

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-members/status-profiles-in-sap/ba-p/13268351

 

Regards

Rashid Khan

entry.title: Re: Kerberos-Name difference SNC-Name
entry.content: did you find any solution for this? TIA

entry.title: Re: How to Configure Email- Notification to T-code WLF_IDOC(IDoc Monitoring) in S/4 for error record
entry.content:
Hi,

Glad you got the solution you needed.

I'm also looking to replicate your logic but I only want SAP to trigger an email to the recipients if an IDOC has failed in Status 51 or 52.

Does anyone know if this is possible please?

I have an variant setup In WLF_IDOC TCODE to detect errors 51 or 52 that can be linked to an SM36 job.

Our requirement is:

Run WLF_IDOC

IF the report returns back any IDOC errors 

Then send email.

Else do nothing 

Run every 30 minutes throughout the day.

entry.title: Re: cl_attachment_service_api usage in S/4HANA Cloud Publ...
entry.content:
Dear @patrick_winkler,

Thank you for your support!

I’ve reviewed the class documentation in ADT, but I’m still facing a few challenges.

While I’ve successfully created an attachment using the create_attachment method and can retrieve its content via get_stream_attachment_content, I’m struggling with the get_list_of_attachments method, as it continues to return an empty list. Additionally, the delete_attachment method throws an error without providing details on what went wrong.

Is it possible that I’m missing a configuration step for the Attachment Service?

I would greatly appreciate any guidance you could offer on these issues.

This code bellow reproduces what I'm trying to do:

 

DATA: media_resource     TYPE if_attachment_service_api=>ty_s_media_resource,
      attachment_service TYPE REF TO if_attachment_service_api,
      error              TYPE REF TO cx_attachment_service,
      text               TYPE string.

DATA(str) = `{"test": "test01"}`.
DATA(xstr) = cl_abap_conv_codepage=>create_out( codepage = `UTF-8` 
                  )->convert( source = str ).

media_resource = VALUE #( mime_type = `application/json; charset=utf-8`
                          value     = xstr ).

attachment_service = cl_attachment_service_api=>get_instance( ).

TRY.
  attachment_service->create_attachment(
    EXPORTING iv_attachmentobjecttype = 'BUSINESSPARTNER'
              iv_attachmentobjectkey  = '14100014'
              iv_filename             = 'Testing.json'
              iv_documenttype         = 'SAT'
              is_media_resource       = media_resource
    IMPORTING es_attachment           = DATA(attach) ).
    
  CATCH cx_attachment_service INTO error.
    text = error->get_longtext( ).
ENDTRY.

TRY.
    attachment_service->get_list_of_attachments(
      EXPORTING iv_attachmentobjecttype = 'BUSINESSPARTNER'
                iv_attachmentobjectkey  = attach-attachmentobjectkey
                iv_technicalobjecttype  = attach-technicalobjecttype
      IMPORTING et_attachments          = DATA(attachments) ).

  CATCH cx_attachment_service INTO error.
    text = error->get_longtext( ).
ENDTRY.

TRY.
    attachment_service->delete_attachment(
      EXPORTING iv_logicaldocument      = attach-logicaldocument
                iv_archivedocumentid    = attach-archivedocumentid
                iv_technicalobjecttype  = attach-technicalobjecttype
                iv_attachmentobjecttype = 'BUSINESSPARTNER'
                iv_attachmentobjectkey  = attach-attachmentobjectkey
      IMPORTING ev_success              = DATA(success)
                et_messages             = DATA(messages) ).

  CATCH cx_attachment_service INTO error.
    text = error->get_longtext( ).
ENDTRY.

 

 
Kind regards,

Dan.

entry.title: Issue for getting Output Format for a SQVI query
entry.content:
Hi everyone, I'm having an issue with solving problems with SQVI queries.

Recently, I made a change (added a field from inside an SQVI query) using Tcode SQ01, and applied a formula to get that field in the Output Report.

This is the query, I didn't change anything here, already it's in 'SAP List Viewer', but when I'm executing it, it doesn't show me any 'Output Format' option-

And, the output report looks like now-

Most importantly, we can't export that report.

But, previously I used to get this like-

The report used to look like-

So, I would think that the report format has been changed somehow and I couldn't figure it out, can somebody please help me out with this?

NOTE: I've seen some  solutions in SAP community but it looks like the links has been broken.

And I'm using SAP ECC system.

Thanks in advance.

 

Regards,

Sayan Kayal

entry.title: Logic to derive final billing amount based on comparison between two amounts
entry.content:
Hi Folks,

Based on pricing logic designed, system will calculate an actual billing amount. There is another minimum commitment value to be maintained in the system. At the end, final billing amount should be the one which is higher between actual billing amount & minimum commitment amount.

How to achieve this logic? Also, where to provide a provision to configure the minimum commitment amount which may differ customer wise.

Thanks,

entry.title: Re: How to Upload a File in a RAP Freestyle V2 Application?
entry.content: Can you share the reasons why you are not allowed to use Open Source 3rd party tools?

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Dear @David_Chaviano,

I'd like to start with a big "Thank you" for an opportunity such as this.

A little bit about me, I served 8 years in the U.S. Coast Guard primarily performing search and rescue but also went into a specialized security role. It's the latter role where I experienced hardships based on my gender. I had no other choice than to give up my career and transition out of the military.

Most recently, I have been a stay-at-home Mom since being laid off last October from a travel nurse staffing company where I worked as a credentialing specialist, verifying a candidate’s licenses and required knowledge for a wide range of nursing jobs. I not only made sure a candidate was qualified for a role but also had to uphold regulations and protocol to ensure they were a right fit. I upheld vendor requirements to make sure our partners were more than satisfied with our nurses.

When possible, I have filled my spare time exploring a career in SAP. I believe that gaining a toolset such as SAP is the missing puzzle piece for me. Having been undervalued in the past, I am more determined than ever to come out on top. Becoming certified in a SAP career path gives me the opportunity to think critically and help create solutions to running a business, whether that be a small business or a big corporation.

I am ready and eager to take the next steps to becoming certified in one of the career paths SAP has to offer. I believe I embody the ideal candidate for the Digital Skills Initiative’s support based on the following criteria:

  • I am a Military veteran
  • I am a Women
  • I am considered a disabled veteran through the VA (considered employable) and neurodivergent - I refer to it as neuro-spicy 😉
  • I'm switching careers to better align with with my goals and aspirations.
  • It would cause hardship as a single income household to pay for a certification attempt. Which is why I landed here when exploring avenues to make this career shift possible.

Again, thank you for your consideration.

Ryan Angel

www.linkedin.com/in/ryan-angel-b2374197

entry.title: Data import from 3rd party ERP to SAP Signavio Intelligence
entry.content:
Hello community!

It is about SAP Signavio 
I am asked by customers who process logistics in 3rd party ERP to import these transactional data into SAP Signavio Process Intelligence for overall process analysis. This is to analyse the entire E2E process including finance which is mapped in SAP. Would API be the right option?

entry.title: Re: How to exclude PO from MRP calculation in S4 Hana Pub...
entry.content:
Hi

MRP calculates the net requirement with POs. I dont think it is possible to excludes PO from MRP Calculation.

Yes there may a long way if you debug the program and find logic for mrp calculation and from their you can change the logic. But it is not advisable.

 

Regards

Rashid Khan

entry.title: Re: Display Icon | Image in Messages for ITS MOBILE
entry.content: I set my global variable GV_ZZ_MESSAGE_TYPE = 'E' in function group LMOB, but the value is always empty when the HTML page is generated (so the IF is always false). The template sees the value only if there is an element on the message screen 0999 (or 2999) with the exact name GV_ZZ_MESSAGE_TYPE. The element must be visible on the screen. Why is that? Are you able to pass the value to the html template without having the element on the screen?

entry.title: 🔵 Advanced Strategies for Intelligent Data Applications on SAP HANA Cloud
entry.content:
This session will cover HDI's advanced features.

We will discuss and show HDI parameters to optimize the deployment, how to use the Fabric Virtual Table in HDI, and advanced HANA tooling features, including AI generation of SQL or CDS.

entry.title: Re: Planned order not consuming inventory
entry.content:
Hello

It's difficult to tell what is happening because you did not provide many details about this issue. 

Can you please attach a screenshot of MD04 to illustrate the planning situation?

Regards,
Caetano

entry.title: Re: no Purchase Order displaying in Manage change request...
entry.content:
Hi 

With this app, you can create change requests for existing purchase order schedule lines based on the list of rescheduling proposals from MRP rescheduling checks. You can send these change requests to suppliers using an external system to request a change of the quantity or delivery date for a purchase order schedule line so that material availability can be ensured and customer requirements can be fulfilled. In the external system, suppliers can accept or reject the change requests or send new proposals. After you have received an answer from a supplier, you can either apply or discard the changes included in a specific change request.

Check role and setting for it 

https://fioriappslibrary.hana.ondemand.com/sap/fix/externalViewer/#/detail/Apps('F0670')/S28OP

 

Hope you will find something from here

 

Regards

Rashid Khan

entry.title: Standard SAP OData service. Get formatted document texts
entry.content:
Hello colleagues,

how I can read Order or Quotation header or item texts via standard OData services like ....odata/sap/API_SALES_QUOTATION_SRV/A_SalesQuotationItemText(... and get back formatted text like in document and not as a string? 

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Standard SAP OData service. Get formatted document texts
entry.content: They are unstructured long texts so they fittingly come back as texts. If you are referring to something like Word documents then you would want to look into attachments.

entry.title: Re: Is Manage Material Coverage a standalone app
entry.content:
Hi 

Since this Manage app provides detailed information and proposed solutions for specific materials or items, you first have to select which materials or items you want to manage. Therefore, no separate tile is delivered for this Manage app. To access the Manage Material Coverage app, you first have to start the Monitor Material Coverage app and make various settings to display only those items you want to monitor. After selecting one or more items in the list, you can navigate to the Manage app where you can solve your issues. If you save your personalized settings as a variant tile, you can access this Manage app directly from your home page.

If you want to view the planning situation for one material only, you can also start the Manage Material Coverage app directly from the Check Material Coverage tile, which is also delivered by SAP.

Check this for more details 

https://fioriappslibrary.hana.ondemand.com/sap/fix/externalViewer/#/detail/Apps('F0251')/S8OP

Regards

Rashid Khan

entry.title: New MDG implementation for supplier module - Restriction based on BU group or alternate solutions
entry.content:
We have a new MDG implementation for supplier module and would like to restrict different groups of users with "Account Group" (In search) and also in "Manage Supplier" -> Select ‘New’ > "Organization" > "X– Create Supplier" to specific "Business Partner id/group".


Looking at the B_BUPA_GRP authorization object, it doesn't check for these BP BU groups. We did set some groups in "Maintain Authorization Groups " but are there any other steps to configure so the authorization checks are performed for B_BUPA_GRP.


If we would like to go with restriction for display/change/create based on "BU Groups", is it only done by custom development?
Is there any other suggestion to go with data visibility restriction of BP’s? And also to create change requests for specific groups?

entry.title: Re: What are the best approach to store/replicate histori...
entry.content:
Apologies, this question didn't show up in our 'SAP Landscape Transformation replication server' community because the tag was missing.

This might be a better question for other users/consultants.  If you still have questions on this, can you please clarify what you mean by 'store/replicate historical data'?

entry.title: Strategy in capacity scheduling table
entry.content:
Which dispatch sequence is used to dispatch orders in capacity scheduling table.

What will happen in planning mode Sequence and Bucket.

What is the difference between find slot, insert operation scheduling control in set strategy.

entry.title: Re: How can i upgrade SAP Gui 8.0 from 7.5 with command l...
entry.content:
Hello,

Are you using SAP GUI 800 32bit or 64bit? You can verify that each has a different name for the command line in SAP Setup.

To make an upgrade you need first to uninstall the previous product version via command line:

NwSapSetup.exe /Silent /Uninstall /Product="<product_name>"

Then to install the new product:

C:\Users\<user>\Installation Server\Setup\NwSapSetup.exe /Silent /Product="<product_name>"

<user> and <product_name> are placeholders which content may vary depending on the user executing the command and the target product.

Also /silent parameter is optional but it causes the process to be executed silently on background, it can be replaced by /nodlg (no dialog but with visible progress bar) or you can completely remove this parameter if wanted.

Hope this helps!

entry.title: ECC to Target CFIN S4 : Error- Balancing field "Profit Center" in line item 001 not filled
entry.content:
Dear Members,

I am trying to validate document replication from Source ECC to Target CFIN.

With respect to this validation, I have posted SD and MM documents in ECC replicate to CFIN S4.
Document creation flow as followed:
creation of sales order - VA01 > 
creation of delivery & post goods issue -VL01N >
billing invoice creation -VF01 OR VF04 > 
creation of purchase requisition - ME51N > 
creation of purchase order-ME21N > creation of goods receipt - MIGO > creation of supplier invoice - MIRO

The RV document under VF01 need to replicate to S4 with success posting's in target BKPF table , However I am facing Error: (Balancing field "Profit Center" in line item 001 not filled).

As per S4 Document splitting settings PRCTR is mandatory and in ECC RV type document VF01 we are not maintained profit center. How to work around with successful posting in S4 CFIN ?
What are the steps and pre requisites I need to follow or which I am missing please suggest.

Thanks,

entry.title: Re: OVR/INS
entry.content: Insert or Overwrite. It relates to what functionality you want in a field.

We have followed all the steps as per this blog:Integration of My Inbox Fiori application with SAP... - SAP Community

Can you please guide us and point us in the right direction in order to fix this issue ?

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi @David_Chaviano 

I am Gorkem and I can identify myself in following categories,

People in remote or underserved locations that may be not have access to the same economic opportunities as their urban or more privileged counterparts.
First generation college students.
People who lack the financial means to afford a certification attempt for themselves.

When I finished my University about One year ago, I started my SAP journey. I discover SAP learning and get a foundational course then I have got a job thanks to you. and still I am currently working as a consultant. I was also a first generation college attendee in my family. I am living in the rural area in Turkey and my purchasing power is diminishing due to high inflationary environment. I am newly graduated 1 year ago from university and I have not got enough savings for the certification exam. 

I would appreciate that If I receive a certification exam attempt. I have been studying for the exam about a month and already finished 2 learning journey. I am grateful for this opportunity.

Thank you SAP!!

entry.title: Re: Showing last one month data in HANA
entry.content: This one works for the last months data --- SELECT YEAR(ORG_TIMECREATED), MONTH(ORG_TIMECREATED), ORG_NAME, ORG_TIMECREATED FROM Organization WHERE YEAR(ORG_TIMECREATED) = YEAR(add_months(now(), -1)) AND MONTH(ORG_TIMECREATED) = MONTH(add_months(now(), -1))

entry.title: Re: How to Query The Date Filed in OData?
entry.content: Thank you Umakant ...

entry.title: Re: Welcome to the beginner corner!
entry.content: @StephanieMarley I am FI-AA consultant and I would llike to improve myself in CO and some other modules that are related with FI such as CM, CR. I have joined the TechEd community. Thank you for letting me know. I am excited for the virtual event.

entry.title: Manage work center capacity app
entry.content:
Intro
In GUI we will have explanation for every fields and columns in reports or transactions. But in Fiori we don't have such option and this makes it difficult to understand about the values in the fields and their functionalities. For people who are moving from GUI to Fiori it will be easy to understand. But for people who start from FIORI, it will be difficult.

If you face the same then please raise a request to SAP. People from SAP please look in to it.

Main Part:

In my case when I have seen the Manage work center Capacity app, I could able to see multiple column in the output screen. But no explanations were there.

Later compared this screen with old sap CM02 screen to found the explanation for the values.

Utilization:

Here you can see the evaluation period from Fiori and GUI is 1 month and have 5 weeks. So the utilization column will have 5 bars = 5 weeks. Also the bucket type defines this.

Cumulative load = Requirements / available capacity * 100 = 24/184 *100 = 13%

It will consider the requirement and capacity with in the evaluation period i.e. 1 month this value is calculated. 

Total capacity requirement = the total work hours occupied on that week by planned or production orders.

Max load = the maximum capacity load on the evaluation period. Here its 75% as in CM02

Average load = Requirement / Remaining available capacity * 100 = 24/160 * 100 = 15 %

Minimum Load = the least load with in the evaluation period. Here its 0% as in CM02

Conclusion:

I hope this may help you on understanding the app more. Please post you comments if there are changes. Please go through for more details link

entry.title: Re: anybody tried the learning hub IDES yet?
entry.content: can't believe nobody bought it in the last 4 months or so, esp since there's no open.sap.com any more.

entry.title: Re: PM form giving an error Your request has not been processed successfully
entry.content: Was a solution given for this? I'm getting this error today on only one form in our test environment that was fine yesterday

entry.title: Sales Contract to be consider in MRP in Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello,

Have you ever tried considering sales contracts in the context of MRP (Material Requirements Planning) in a public cloud system? I have attempted this with sales orders, but I'm interested in understanding how it might work with sales contracts.

Thank you
